data.body: Implemented + independently concurrency-reviewed (reviewer stress-tested 50x; no blockers). Map runs with bounded concurrency (max_concurrency from IR, default 1=serial): parallel agent calls, ALL commits+state writes serialized via rc.lock/_guard. Concurrency isolated in map_fanout.py (the sole narrow Burr-tripwire relaxation, recorded rationale); ban stays armed over executor/interpreter (lazy import keeps AST clean). Deterministic replay preserved (LWW per iteration-keyed frame marker). Tests: serial-parity, serialized-commits probe, REAL concurrency via 4-party barrier (would deadlock if serial), exactly-once replay under concurrency, guarded control-in-map-body. 1 MAJOR review finding (unguarded control-construct state writes — GIL-masked) fixed+regression-tested. 171 tests pass, ruff clean. Commit 4fab656f.
